description: Generate complete nonfiction books with Teneo: outline, manuscript, cover, and PDF/EPUB/DOCX files.
name: io.github.Traviseric/teneo-book-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Per-agent API key from the Teneo dashboard. Books are charged to this key owner's Teneo credit balance.
environmentVariables.name: TENEO_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Teneo API base URL. Defaults to https://teneo.io. Use https://staging.teneo.io for staging.
environmentVariables.name: TENEO_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional ecosystem service key alternative to TENEO_API_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: TENEO_SERVICE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Required when using TENEO_SERVICE_KEY. Teneo user id whose credits are charged.
environmentVariables.name: TENEO_ON_BEHALF_OF

title: Teneo Book Generation
